cmd_askaquestions_desc: Opens the Ask a Questions settings panel
cmd_pix_desc: Generate a Pix QR Code and copy-paste code
opt_sugestao_canal_desc: Channel where suggestions will be sent
cmd_faq_desc: Open the FAQ system settings panel
cmd_patreon_desc: Open the Patreon system settings panel
cmd_supporter_desc: Open the Supporter Experience system settings
cmd_fechar_todos_desc: Closes all open tickets in the server at once.
cmd_painel_staff_desc: Opens the staff management panel in the ticket.
cmd_ticket_desc: Send a ticket panel with button or select menu
cmd_autotranslate_desc: Configure automatic translation reactions for a channel.
opt_autotranslate_set_desc: Set the channel where the bot will react with 🌐 for translation.
opt_autotranslate_remove_desc: Remove the auto-translate reaction from the configured channel.
cmd_poll_manage_desc: Manage active polls — extend time or end them
